title: eva upgrades
wikitext:
[]: eva upgrades?             Quote Post by EVA_UNIT_01 » Sun Nov 26, 2006 10:06 pm i saw some awesome pictures of the eva units (and oddly enough, that robot thing that was going to replace eva) totally upgraded. where can i get these pics/where are they from?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 26, 2006 10:46 pm Are you talking about the F-TYPE armor from the Evangelion 2 video game? http://evamonkey.com/gallery/evangelion_2/technical_drawing_01

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:08 am i wonder if we will see that Armor in Renewal

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:11 am I hope not.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:29 am master0rolando wrote: i wonder if we will see that Armor in Rebuild

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:43 am Coincedantally enough, I just made the F-Type EVA-01 from Super Robot Wars Alpha my avatar over at the Trivial Being Forums. =P

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:44 am Rebirth Rebuild Renewal ReDeath....aaahhh...its so confusing...

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Nov 27, 2006 2:15 am In before ReEnd of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 27, 2006 3:42 am Don't forget Revival. You just need to make up mnemonics to keep them all straight in your head.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue Nov 28, 2006 4:33 pm How would the EVA even move with all that crap on? Granted, it would probably protect it well enough, but that won't do you much good if you can't walk 2 feet in front of you let alone battle in it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Tue Nov 28, 2006 8:48 pm Well, I also recall EVA-01 dropping off the F-Type equipment from it's body when charging an enemy in SRW Alpha.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Nov 29, 2006 3:59 am its odd...you think the armor would be green or black...not orange...that and purple...its just so queer... (imagines gay fashion desinger guy in charge of Eva's paint job...)
